description_long: This is a mid-top athletic shoe featuring a combination of dark gray and muted green panels, with a black toe cap and sole. The upper material appears to be a mix of synthetic leather and textile, providing both durability and comfort. The shoe is equipped with dark laces in a standard criss-cross pattern, threaded through metallic eyelets for secure fastening. The tongue is padded and displays a subtle logo, while the collar is also cushioned for ankle support. The outsole is solid black, with no visible tread pattern from these views. Overall, the shoe has a modern, urban style suitable for casual or streetwear use.
description: A mid-top, dark gray and green athletic shoe with black sole, criss-cross laces, and padded collar and tongue. The design is modern and urban, with subtle branding on the tongue.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the padded collar, green heel panel, and central seam detail.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the green and gray paneling, subtle embossed logo, and black sole.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the black toe cap, criss-cross lacing, and logo on the tongue.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the green and gray panels, lacing, and padded collar.
attribute_logo: gray text logo on the tongue
